category_sources: Official Tach docs say Tach controls dependencies between Python modules and reports violations of module boundaries and public interfaces.
source_facts.description says it enforces dependencies using modular architecture.
display_name_sources: Official documentation identifies the project as Tach.
docs_sources: Official Tach documentation provides overview, getting started, and commands pages.
source_facts.homepage points to the official docs.gauge.sh documentation site.
repo_sources: Official docs.gauge.sh page links to gauge-sh/tach on GitHub, which redirects to the official tach-org/tach repository.
tags_sources: Official Tach docs describe Python module dependency control, public interfaces, pre-commit hooks, CI checks, and CLI commands.
source_facts.description identifies dependency enforcement and modular architecture.
